programName: Water Main and Lead Service Replacement Program
subsidyType: city-managed neighborhood replacement program financed with BIL support and Nebraska reimbursement
publicSideCovered: yes lead service replacement is coordinated alongside the city's water main replacement work
privateSideCovered: yes city crews replace lead water service lines in active neighborhoods through the Hastings program
propertyRules: eligibility depends on the active neighborhood construction areas and the city's replacement schedule
contractorRules: city crews coordinate replacement progress and customer letters through the Engage Hastings program hub
